message:
撰写 Introduction section。

★ 字数要求：1200词
★ 写入路径：/home/liaowenjie/.openclaw-multi/shared/paper-project-4/drafts/v1/section_introduction.tex

Outline 段落规划：
- P1: Industrial fault diagnosis background — importance of reliable equipment monitoring in modern manufacturing
- P2: Data scarcity challenge — collecting fault samples for all fault types is impractical, especially for rare/novel faults
- P3: Existing ZSL methods — attribute-based zero-shot learning approaches for fault diagnosis (binary attribute vectors, compatibility functions)
- P4: GAN/Diffusion-based generation methods — recent generative approaches for augmenting unseen fault data
- P5: Limitations of existing methods — static binary attributes lose semantic richness; domain shift between seen and unseen; poor generalization
- P6: Our solution — CLIP-Enhanced Semantic Manifold Diffusion (CESM-Diff): leveraging CLIP for continuous semantic embeddings + dual-path diffusion + semantic manifold interpolation
- P7: Contributions (4 points):
  1. First to integrate CLIP text encoder for continuous semantic fault descriptions in zero-shot fault diagnosis
  2. Novel dual-path semantic diffusion architecture with cross-path attention
  3. Semantic Manifold Interpolation (SMI) for smooth unseen fault generation
  4. Comprehensive evaluation on TEP, Hydraulic System, and CWRU datasets
- P8: Paper organization — brief roadmap of remaining sections

相关文件：
- 黄金标准：/home/liaowenjie/.openclaw-multi/shared/paper-project-4/golden_standard.json

完成后回报实际字数。
